title: phyllanthus scaber
intro: Phyllanthus scaber, also known as the dwarf tree or forest tree, is a type of small shrub or tree species native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a laxative and diuretic. The health benefits of Phyllanthus scaber include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to improve overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus scaber often include the use of its leaves, roots, and fruits in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
